metadata.description: LLM-native work management plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: clawket
plugins.description: LLM-native work management dashboard for Claude Code — structured task board + MCP RAG pull tools across sessions

skills.name: clawket
skills.description: Manage work dashboard — view/update tasks, plans, units, cycles.

skills.name: pdd
skills.description: PDD Plan + Unit 사전 예비 설계. 발견-수렴 루프 Phase 1 진입점.

skills.name: scenario-author
skills.description: Atomic 사용자 시나리오 작성 (Given/When/Then). 발견-수렴 루프 Phase 0 진입점.

skills.name: qa-batch
skills.description: Sub-agent batch dispatch + TSV evidence emit + bulk sync transcription. PDD A8 운영 인터페이스.

skills.name: discover-loop
skills.description: 발견-수렴 루프 메인 엔진 — Round R dispatch + 3-way 수렴 판정 + 다음 라운드 schedule.

skills.name: scenario-refine
skills.description: scenario_error 3-way 처리 (atomic 분해 / 의도 재정의 / 삭제) + audit 기록.

skills.name: qa-fix
skills.description: QA defect → fix task 처리 (결함 해결 plan 의 Round R unit 등록).
